memberdef.definition: unsafe new ref double MR.Box_Vector4d.this[int e]
memberdef.name: this[int e]

briefdescription.para: Make a copy of a struct. (Even though we initially pass is_owning: false, we then use the copy constructor to produce an owning instance.)

memberdef.argsstring: (double x, double y, double z, double w)
memberdef.name: Box_Vector4d

briefdescription.para: assuming this is a point represented in homogeneous 4D coordinates, returns the point as 3D-vector Generated from method MR.Vector4d.proj3d.
Convert from a struct by copying it. Note that only ConstBox_Vector4d has this conversion, Box_Vector4d intentionally doesn't.
four-dimensional vector Generated from class MR.Vector4d. This is the non-const reference to the struct.
